tasks.label: Dev: Start API + Web
tasks.detail: Path A — launch both dev servers in their own terminals.

tasks.label: API: Start (dev)
tasks.detail: nest start --watch. Frees port 3000 first, then prints the BOOTSTRAP KEY.

tasks.label: Free port 3000
tasks.detail: Kill any leftover process holding the API port (fixes EADDRINUSE).

tasks.label: Free ports (3000 + 4200)
tasks.detail: Kill leftover API (3000) and web (4200) dev servers.

tasks.label: Web: Start (dev)
tasks.detail: ng serve on http://localhost:4200 (proxies API calls to :3000).

tasks.label: DB: Migrate (deploy)
tasks.detail: Apply pending migrations to the patrice DB (from api/.env).

tasks.label: DB: Reset (DROPS DATA → fresh bootstrap key)
tasks.detail: Wipe + re-migrate the patrice DB. Next API start prints a new bootstrap key.

tasks.label: API: e2e tests (acceptance suite)
tasks.detail: Runs the Slice 1 acceptance suite against the patrice_test DB.

tasks.label: API: Smoke check (health + bootstrap)
tasks.detail: Curl /health and /bootstrap on a running API (:3000).
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:3000/health && echo "" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/bootstrap && echo ""

tasks.label: Docker: Up (build full stack)
tasks.detail: Path B — db + mailpit + api + web. Web http://localhost:8080, Mailpit :8025.

tasks.label: Docker: Down
tasks.detail: Stop and remove the Docker stack (keeps the DB volume).

tasks.label: Docker: Down + wipe volume
tasks.detail: Stop the stack and delete the DB volume (next up gets a fresh bootstrap key).

tasks.label: Vault: Start dev server (Docker)
tasks.detail: Runs Vault in dev mode on :8200 with root token 'dev-root'. Token and VAULT_ADDR are printed to the terminal. Ctrl+C to stop.
tasks.command: docker run --rm -p 8200:8200 -e VAULT_DEV_ROOT_TOKEN_ID=dev-root -e VAULT_DEV_LISTEN_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0:8200 hashicorp/vault:1.17 server -dev

tasks.label: Vault: Enable transit + create key
tasks.detail: Enables the transit secrets engine and creates the 'patrice-integration' key. Requires Vault running on :8200 with VAULT_TOKEN=dev-root.
tasks.command: docker run --rm --network host -e VAULT_ADDR=http://127.0.0.1:8200 -e VAULT_TOKEN=dev-root hashicorp/vault:1.17 sh -c "vault secrets enable transit; vault write -f transit/keys/patrice-integration"

tasks.label: Integration: Smoke — Vault cipher round-trip
tasks.detail: Encrypts a test token via the Vault adapter then decrypts it. Set VAULT_ADDR, VAULT_TOKEN, VAULT_TRANSIT_KEY, INTEGRATION_TOKEN_KEY in api/.env first.
tasks.command: node -e "process.loadEnvFile('.env'); const {AeadEnvAdapter}=require('./dist/integrations/aead-env.adapter'); const {VaultTransitAdapter}=require('./dist/integrations/vault-transit.adapter'); const env=process.env; const v=new VaultTransitAdapter({VAULT_ADDR:env.VAULT_ADDR,VAULT_TOKEN:env.VAULT_TOKEN,VAULT_TRANSIT_KEY:env.VAULT_TRANSIT_KEY}); v.encrypt('smoke-test-token').then(ref=>{console.log('ref:',ref);return v.decrypt(ref)}).then(pt=>{console.log('plaintext:',pt);process.exit(pt==='smoke-test-token'?0:1)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"

tasks.label: Integration: Smoke — KMS cipher round-trip
tasks.detail: Encrypts a test token via the KMS envelope adapter then decrypts it. Set KMS_KEY_ID, AWS_REGION (and AWS creds in env or ~/.aws) in api/.env first.
tasks.command: node -e "process.loadEnvFile('.env'); const {KmsEnvelopeAdapter}=require('./dist/integrations/kms-envelope.adapter'); const env=process.env; const k=new KmsEnvelopeAdapter({KMS_KEY_ID:env.KMS_KEY_ID,AWS_REGION:env.AWS_REGION}); k.encrypt('smoke-test-token').then(ref=>{console.log('ref:',ref);return k.decrypt(ref)}).then(pt=>{console.log('plaintext:',pt);process.exit(pt==='smoke-test-token'?0:1)}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
